creator: freebsd@johnlevine.com
text:
In the lists below keep in mind that libiconv.la and libffi.la aren't installed by the current ports, and are only there because did a local twiddle to install them
-------------------------------
find /usr/local/lib -name '*.la' | xargs grep -l 'libiconv\.la' | xargs pkg which

/usr/local/lib/libpackagekit-glib2.la was installed by package PackageKit-0.6.11_5
